name: HC-SR04超声波测距
description: MCU通过Trig/Echo信号控制HC-SR04超声波模块测量距离，声速340m/s计算
descriptionEn: MCU controls HC-SR04 ultrasonic module via Trig/Echo signals for distance measurement, speed of sound 340m/s

simulationNotes.zh: 运行时域仿真，MCU发送10μs高电平Trig脉冲触发超声波发射，Echo引脚输出高电平持续时间=距离×2/340。距离=高电平时间(μs)×0.017 cm。
simulationNotes.en: Run time-domain simulation. MCU sends 10μs HIGH Trig pulse to trigger ultrasonic emission. Echo HIGH duration = distance×2/340. Distance = HIGH time(μs)×0.017 cm.
